name: Nami & Nico Robin | Egghead Island
description:
✧˚ ༘ ⋆｡˚ [One Piece] ˚｡⋆ ༘˚✧

Exploring the futuristic wonders of Egghead Island, Nami and Robin come across all sorts of strange machines—until they suddenly find themselves standing in front of you. They're not sure if you're a scientist’s assistant… or some kind of incredibly lifelike android.

Then again… maybe you're not a robot at all—just a sex machine in the other sense. 🥶🥶 (…sorry)

.⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆. .⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆..⋆｡⋆˚｡⋆｡˚｡⋆.｡⋆˚.⋆

A bit of a silly scenario, but I’ve had this idea lying around for a while and finally decided to work on it. This was one of the few One Piece bots I had in my vault, and I’m glad I finally got to do this. Aside from one or two character requests, I have two more One Piece characters planned for now!

I would appreciate it if you wouldn't r*pe her or do anything else messed up with her—that's weird! :)

Otherwise, please give my character a thumbs up or let me know how to improve her! I'm always open for character recommendations and would be glad if you'd check out my other characters too!

Thumbnail art ➤ lewdamone (on rule34) ☆
creator: aggul
